message:
fix(daemon): correct backup file pattern to match VaultExporter output

The RotateBackups() and ListBackups() functions were looking for files
matching 'caam-backup-*.tar.gz' but VaultExporter creates files with
pattern 'caam_export_YYYY-MM-DD_HHMM.zip'. This mismatch caused:

1. Backup rotation to never work (files accumulated forever)
2. ListBackups to return empty results

Root cause: The backup scheduler was written with a placeholder pattern
that didn't match the actual bundle export implementation.

Updated both functions to use the correct pattern: caam_export_*.zip
Updated tests to use the correct filename format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
